calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Ri Hong Kuang and Qian Zhen Li were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor Hoa Jun Kuang.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Linhong Tan was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jenny Qianzhen Li.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Matthew Haojun Kuang.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
